text: Welcome to this spacious home offering endless potential to create the dream home you've been waiting for. With 4 generously sized bedrooms and abundant living space, this property provides a flexible layout perfect for growing families, entertaining or working from home. Outside you will find a fully fenced in yard ideal for pets, play and outdoor gatherings. With a new liner installed you will be ready to swim in the in ground pool on those sunny days in your future. The property also features a 2 car garage, a shed and a barn perfect for toys, hobbies or additional work space. Whether you're looking to renovate, restore or reimagine, this home is a rare opportunity to build equity in desirable location. Bring your vision and unlock the full potential this property has to offer. Assisted Showings Thursday, Friday and Saturday reach out to schedule.

Quintessential New Hampshire Living with Lake Access in Sanbornton Here is your opportunity to own a classic New Hampshire retreat in the highly desirable Hermit Lake neighborhood of Sanbornton, offering access to both Hermit Lake and Lake Winnisquam. Set in a peaceful, established community, this three-bedroom, two-bath home offers incredible potential for the buyer ready to renovate and personalize. Whether you are looking for a year-round residence, vacation getaway, or investment opportunity, this property is positioned for value and opportunity. The main level features all primary living spaces, including three bedrooms, two baths, a bright kitchen and dining area, and a comfortable living room designed for everyday ease. Upstairs, you will find a spacious family room along with a three-season game room-ideal for entertaining, relaxing, or creating additional flexible living space. A full basement with walk-up access provides excellent storage and future finishing possibilities. Outside, multiple decks invite morning coffee, summer grilling, and peaceful evenings surrounded by nature. The two-car garage offers year-round convenience and functionality. Residents of Five Circle Point enjoy access to Hermit Lake for town residents, while Lake Winnisquam beach is open to the public-making swimming, kayaking, boating, and lakeside relaxation part of everyday life in the Lakes Region. If you have been waiting for the right opportunity to create your own Lakes Region retreat, this is it. Delayed showings until the Open House on Saturday, March 7th in the afternoon. Do not miss your chance to explore the potential of this special property.

Meredith, NH 03253--You won't want to miss this opportunity! Set on over 4 acres, this classic Cape offers space, charm, and a variety of amenities. Highlights include wood-burning fireplaces, a large kitchen island, beautiful wide-plank wood floors, an attached 2-car garage, a detached barn-style garage, perennial gardens, and even your own tennis court-perfect for play now or easily converted to pickleball. Located on a quiet dead-end street with only six homes, this property offers privacy while being within walking distance to local schools and close to Page Pond for hiking and dog walking. Inside, the main level features wide-plank flooring throughout the kitchen, dining, living, and sunroom areas. The thoughtfully designed kitchen provides multiple workspaces and quality appliances. The living room centers around a stunning fireplace with glass doors, while the sunroom is filled with natural light-an ideal spot to relax with a book. The dining room offers flexibility for everyday meals or larger gatherings and includes a second fireplace for added warmth. A first-floor bedroom suite allows for convenient one-level living and offers great potential for updates to build equity. Upstairs, you'll find two spacious bedrooms, a full bath, and ample storage. The basement provides additional space for storage or a potential retreat area. With solid features, room to customize, and a desirable location, this home is ready for its next chapter. This is coming soon with an open house scheduled for this coming Saturday, March 7, 2026 from 10:00-12:00 noon.

Welcome to 10 Roy Drive, a true gem located in one of Hudson's most sought-after neighborhoods. This beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 4-bath home offers timeless charm and modern comfort from the moment you arrive. The inviting farmers porch sets the tone for a warm and welcoming interior featuring stunning crown molding, gorgeous hardwood floors and an oversized family room perfect for entertaining, complete with two wood-burning fireplaces. The serene backyard is a private retreat surrounded by mature trees and nature, ideal for relaxing or hosting guests. As an added bonus, the basement includes a nearly new sauna, offering a luxurious touch to your wellness routine. The basement is partially finished with plenty of potential to expand, transforming the space into additional living or recreational space to suit your needs. This home also features a 2-car garage, a whole house generator providing peace of mind and the convenience of public water and sewer! This spacious layout, thoughtful upgrades and prime location is the perfect place to call home. Showings begin at the Open House, starting Thursday 6/26/25.

The home you've been waiting for! Fresh, bright, and move-in ready, this property offers space, comfort, and value in all the right places. Step inside to discover gleaming hardwood floors throughout and a thoughtfully updated interior. The stunning kitchen features stainless steel appliances (honorable mention: a highly efficient induction stove), ample cabinetry, and a clean, contemporary aesthetic that flows seamlessly into the main living spaces. A lovely first-floor laundry room is most ideal. The bathroom has been beautifully updated with modern finishes and stylish fixtures adding substantial value to the home. The primary suite on the main living floor is what separates this home from the rest. Upstairs, the additional 3 bedrooms are privately situated, creating a natural separation between primary and secondary sleeping areas. Downstairs, the unfinished basement offers tremendous potential, including an additional finished room perfect for a home office, playroom, or hobby space. With room for expansion, there's opportunity to further customize the home to fit your needs. Outdoor living is equally impressive. A spacious deck overlooks the serene 4-acre setting, providing the perfect place to relax, entertain, or enjoy peaceful country views. In addition to the clean and spacious 2-car garage, the true highlight of this property is the large commercial-grade garage. The wraparound driveway adds convenience and creates the potential for rental income. The flexibility makes this property truly stand out. Move-in ready, and packed with potential, 19 Auburn Road is a rare opportunity combining modern updates with acreage, unmatched utility space, and an unbeatable location with its proximity to I-93. Open house 3/7/26 and 3/8/26 11-12:30.

'Welcome to this charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath Single Family Split Entry home in Sandown, New Hampshire, offering 1,366 square feet of comfortable living space on a beautiful and private 3.25-acre lot. Nestled on a quiet street, this home provides a peaceful setting while still being centrally located for easy access to local amenities, shopping, and commuting routes. The great private lot offers plenty of space to enjoy the outdoors, whether relaxing, gardening, or hosting gatherings, and there is ample off-street parking for family and guests alike. This property combines privacy, convenience, and functionality in a desirable Sandown location.

If you have been looking for space, privacy, and a layout that simply makes sense, this home delivers! Located in a beautiful neighborhood, this well-designed home offers easy one-level living with the flexibility today's buyers want. The open concept kitchen, dining, and living area is the heart of the home, centered around a wood burning fireplace and designed for gathering. The beautiful primary suite is privately positioned at the end of the home, offering oversized closets and a spacious spa-like bathroom with a soaking tub. The fully finished basement adds significant bonus space and includes its own bathroom - ideal for guests, extended family, or a dedicated rec room. Step outside to a large private backyard with a deck overlooking ample garden space and a peaceful wooded view. Perfect for the retiring farmer or a micro-homestead dream: raised garden beds, fenced garden areas, a pergola for shaded outdoor time, and a gardener's yard with infrastructure like a shed and room to grow, gather, and putter. Plenty of privacy to make it yours today. Major updates have already been addressed, plus thoughtful features that support easy living. A solid, move-in ready home in a neighborhood you will love. Showings to begin at the open house, Saturday March 7.

Experience the perfect blend of comfort and recreation in this charming 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home. Situated on a prime corner lot in one of Stratham's most desirable locations, you are just moments away from the trailheads and community events of Stratham Hill Park and the fish and game trail at the end of Jason Drive provides access to a view of the bay. Step inside to find an inviting living area where cathedral ceilings, hard wood flooring and natural light create an airy, expansive feel. Whether you're curling up by the cozy wood stove on a winter evening or hosting a summer dinner party, this space is designed for all of your needs. The excitement continues outdoors. Transition seamlessly to your backyard, featuring a large 2 level deck, above-ground swimming pool. apple trees and fenced in garden beds. It's more than just a house; it's a place to start your summer creating memories that last a lifetime. Don't miss this rare opportunity to join the vibrant Stratham community! Schedule your private showing today.

This modular ranch can use decorating, updating and some repairs but the basics are here at this private homesite. 2 bedrooms and 2 baths on the 1st floor along with a den or office. Want to raise your own food? There's plenty of open land for gardens and animals. If you need garage space, the 2+ bay garage and attached 10x20 storage/workshop should fit. Forest Lake and Pisgah State Park are not far away for your outdoor recreational activities.

Enjoy peaceful country living in this to-be-built Full Dormer Cape, thoughtfully situated on a beautiful 1-acre lot. This well-designed home offers the convenience of a first-floor bedroom with a walk-in closet and a full bath nearby - perfect for flexible living arrangements. The open-concept kitchen and living area create a bright, welcoming space ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen will feature granite countertops, a center island, abundant cabinetry, and a sliding glass door leading to the back deck - a perfect spot to relax and take in the surrounding landscape. Upstairs, you'll find two generously sized bedrooms and a second full bath, providing comfortable space for family, guests, or a home office. A charming covered front porch enhances the home's curb appeal, while the attached 24x24 garage offers ample room for vehicles, storage, or hobbies. Outdoor enthusiasts will appreciate being close to Pisgah State Park, a breathtaking 13,300-acre public recreation area featuring seven ponds, four highland ridges, extensive wetlands, and a 20-acre parcel of old-growth forest. The nearby Rails to Trails system offers additional opportunities for walking, biking, and enjoying the natural beauty of the area. Conveniently located in Hinsdale, just minutes from Vermont and I-91, this home combines rural charm with commuter-friendly access. Expected completion: mid to late May 2026. Photos are facsimile.

This could be the opportunity you have been waiting for to own your own home. Solid 3 bedroom, 1.5 bath raised ranch with walkout basement area just waiting to be finished. Spacious lot perfect for gardens and play. Needs some work but at this price you can't really go wrong. Cash or rehab loan only. What are you waiting for?

Rich in history and completely renovated within the last five years, this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 2-bath Cape blends timeless charm with modern comfort in the heart of Alstead. Leading into the home, you'll find an oversized heated porch - the perfect space for a mudroom, cozy sitting area, or a relaxing spot to enjoy your morning coffee year-round. The kitchen welcomes you with a large island, ideal for entertaining, gathering with guests, or having the space you need for everyday meal preparation. Set on over 5 acres with a cleared path leading to a private open level area ideal for recreation, outdoor entertaining, or simply enjoying the peaceful setting. Join us Saturday 3/7 from 11AM-1PM for an Open House.

Welcome to this treasure of a historic gem! Imagine living in part of the old train station from Newton! The ticketing station was moved to where it sits now and the home was built onto it. What a wonderful thing piece of history! Walk through the 5.7 acres with at approximately 3 acres of woods with wildlife that is often seen in the morning grazing. Note: trailer leaves by closing. Home is being sold "AS IS". There is a large barn on the property pre-approved for an ADU. Barn has good bones but need a lot of tlc to return it to glory. But this a huge bonus! Newly renovated Kitchen and Bathroom with beautiful quartz counters! New Electrical system, New Furnace, New Flooring, and a New Hot Water Heater. Open House Sat. 2/28 from 11:30-1p

Turnkey living in the heart of Peterborough. At the center of the home is a stunning updated kitchen that opens seamlessly to the main living spaces, creating an inviting layout ideal for everyday living and entertaining. A practical and spacious mudroom connects to the attached one-car garage, providing convenient everyday entry. The finished lower level offers excellent bonus space perfect for a rec room, movie nights, hobbies, or a home office. Ample flex spaces make working from home easy, while the unfinished portion of the basement provides additional storage. Outside, the property offers plenty of room to enjoy the outdoors with a spacious yard, patio area, wrap around deck and even a tree house that adds a touch of charm. A convenient storage shed provides additional space for lawn equipment, tools, and outdoor gear. in a friendly cul-de-sac neighborhood ideal for walking, biking, and outdoor play, this home combines privacy and community while remaining just minutes from Peterborough's vibrant downtown. Enjoy easy access to MacDowell Lake, scenic trails, and the shops, restaurants, and cultural attractions of Depot Square.

Newly reduced price! This is an as is sale. With renovation, this 3 bedroom 1 1/2 bath single family home can be upgraded to todays standards! Situated on a beautiful .55 acre lot. Featuring a spacious sun room and a large living room with full bathroom on first floor. One car garage and full basement-Metal roof-Private property with mountain view potential. Located close to town.

Opportunity of a lifetime! This rare, one-owner home includes a custom-built Ranch and an oversized/detached garage, formerly used as a custom cabinet shop, with a full 1,088 sq. ft. IN-LAW apartment above with its own address. The heated shop is a dream, offering approx. 1,700 sq. ft. of work space with 10 ft. ceilings, 2 overhead doors (one with a loading dock), 80 gal. piped compressor, half bath, and wired for a 2 post car lift and more! Two separate paved driveways provide privacy while a charming brick walkway connects both dwellings with ease. The main home exudes quality craftsmanship at every turn from the hand-crafted birchwood balusters to the high-end kitchen showcasing custom made cabinetry, butcher block counter tops, tiled backsplash, cathedral T&G ceiling--open to the bright and airy dining/living area showcasing a functional vintage wood stove. Pristine hardwood floors lead to the 3-season enclosed front porch, ideal for morning coffee or a good book. The main bath feels like a spa with its multi head step-in shower & claw-foot tub-both w/ soothing stone accents, tin ceiling, and custom-built vanity. Two generously sized bedrooms with mirrored closet doors complete the main level. The LL features a separate laundry room, guest/third bedroom with a private living room equipped with a cozy wood stove and half bath. Thoughtfully designed with superior woodwork throughout, this home shows exceptional craftsmanship you simply can't replicate. Solid Wood Doors, Mini Splits, Standby Generator, Brand NEW Vinyl Siding, cascading stone walls, and mature gardens complete the picture. Create your own homestead/family compound, enjoy abundant space for hobbies/projects, or potential use for rental income-many possibilities! *Total square footage/room count includes the main house AND detached In-Law Apt* Tucked away in a quaint small town, yet 15 minutes to shopping/restaurants, Rt. 93, and under 40 min to the Lakes Region for fun to be had in all four seasons!

Welcome to 1 Stagecoach Drive- a spacious and beautifully maintained Cape set on a private 1.67-acre lot, offering the ideal combination of comfort, efficiency, and room to gather. Additional highlights include a two-car attached garage with ample storage and the privacy of a generous 1.67-acre lot - offering plenty of space to relax, play, and enjoy the outdoors. If you've been searching for space, flexibility, and a serene setting in Sandown, this exceptional Cape is ready to welcome you home. OPEN HOUSE SATURDAY 3/7/26 FROM 10:00AM-12:00PM.

Welcome to this solidly built 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath Cape nestled in a desirable neighborhood close to hospitals, shopping, and everyday conveniences. Welcome to 520 Ocean Boulevard, ideally located in Hampton's premier Boar's Head neighborhood! Enjoy ocean accessibility and views of serene north beach AND south to the vibrant main beach as well as marsh views to the west! This season calls for a country home that keeps the chill at the door while welcoming the first signs of spring. This well-maintained custom reproduction Cape is tucked away on 12+ private acres on a quiet road with pleasant views of the southwestern hills in a picturesque setting. A spacious entryway leads to a comfortable family room with brick flooring, a wood stove, and a slider to the expansive deck and patio. The kitchen stands out as the heart of the home, with wood cabinetry, granite countertops, JennAir ovens, and a gas range. The bright dining and living room areas are designed for entertaining with attractive pine flooring and exposed beams. The second floor has a primary suite, with its own dedicated stairway, bespoke walk-in closets, a generous tiled shower, and dual granite-topped vanities. There are two additional bedrooms and a hallway bathroom. Winter is cozy with wood-burning and propane stoves, and central air to cool you in the summer. On-demand hot water and an efficient new Bryant furnace. The home also has solar power, with 10 years remaining on the lease, maintained by Tesla for optimal performance. Raised garden beds, workshop, two garages, and a chicken coop. The exterior features barnboard siding and antique nails, adding an authentic, handcrafted character to the home. Wooded trails wind through the property, perfect for hiking and horseback riding, offering a striking backdrop in all seasons. Come see this exceptional property and imagine it as your next home! Open House on Friday, March 6th from 12-3:00.

With numerous upgrades throughout, this move-in-ready home offers the perfect balance of charm, space, and modern comfort in one of New Hampshire's most desirable regions. This property is ready to impress! Showings begin Saturday, 3/7/26, at the Open House from 11:00 AM-1:00 PM, with an additional Open House on Sunday, 3/8/26, from 11:00 AM-1:00 PM.

Welcome to 26 Harmony Road in Northwood, a truly special property that combines the beauty of lakeside living with the charm of one of New Hampshire's most sought-after towns. Inside, the home features a bright open-concept layout with soaring cathedral ceilings, creating an airy and welcoming living space filled with natural light. The main living area flows seamlessly into the kitchen and dining spaces, making it perfect for entertaining or relaxing after a day on the water. The flexible floor plan includes a first-floor bedroom and full bath, ideal for guests or convenient one-level living. A practical mudroom provides the perfect drop zone for lake gear, boots, and coats. The finished basement with a built-in bar creates a fun and inviting entertainment area for gatherings, game nights, or watching the big game. Outside, a large deck overlooks the yard, where you'll also find a private putting green for practicing your short game or enjoying time outdoors with friends and family. Additional highlights include a detached two-car garage, generous outdoor space, and a property designed for both relaxation and recreation. Whether you're searching for a year-round home or the perfect New Hampshire lake escape, 26 Harmony Road offers a rare opportunity to enjoy private Harvey Lake access, space to entertain, and the relaxed Northwood lifestyle all in one exceptional property.

Wolfeboro, the "Oldest Summer Resort In America". Whether looking for a year round home or a second home for those getaways, this one checks off all the boxes. Close to downtown Wolfeboro with access to Cotton Valley Rail Trail walks/jogging/biking/snowmobiles to Town~Extraordinary shopping and many restaurants to enjoy. It's nostalgic 4th Of July celebrations, fireworks over Wolfeboro Bay, Summer Concerts by the Town Docks at Cate Park, Winter Holiday Parade and Tree Lighting, New Years Fireworks,~Wolfeboro has so much to offer w/it's own Ski Slopes at Abenaki Ski Area~Pop Whalen Ice Arena~World Class Cross Country Ski Trails~Golf Course, Downtown Pickleball Courts, The Nick Recreational Area & on...What are you waiting for? Be in for Summer Fun!!!!

Experience the charm and craftsmanship of this beautiful Coventry log home, privately sited and offering coveted water rights. Set on 2.42 landscaped acres abutting conservation land and located on a cul-de-sac, this classic Colonial offers space and everyday comfort with convenient access to Route 101, regional commuter routes, and nearby town centers. Outside, mature landscaping supported by an in-ground irrigation system surrounds a koi pond, two decks, and hot tub. Two storage sheds provide additional storage. Offering room to gather, work, relax, and grow, 5 Ridge Road provides flexible living within a well-established Newfields setting.

A rare and versatile multi-family opportunity offering income potential, multi-generational living, and exceptional workspace options. Car enthusiasts, hobbyists, and contractors will appreciate the impressive four-car garage with steel beam construction and second-floor storage, creating wide-open space for vehicles, equipment, or projects. The property also includes a stunning Post and Beam office built in 2003 in the style of a traditional barn, featuring a dramatic open interior, radiant heat, and a half bath. With its own entrance from Bohannon Bridge Road and ample parking, this flexible space is ideal for a home business, studio, workshop, or potential future accessory dwelling unit (ADU), subject to local approvals. Situated on two picturesque acres with stone walls, mature landscaping, and established perennials including wisteria, crape myrtle, hydrangea, and roses, this unique property offers a rare combination of living, income, and workspace possibilities.

Situated on three acres in Wolfeboro, New Hampshire, this picturesque antique brick home blends timeless character with modern comfort. The move-in ready home offers thoughtfully preserved architectural details like barn board ceilings, exposed brick and fireplaces. There are sunlit living spaces, cozy gathering rooms, and a beautifully updated kitchen with new floors that create an inviting ambience. It is also near Fernald Station, The Nick, Huggins Hospital and local beaches/lake access for all your activities. It's a rare opportunity to own a historic gem in one of the Lakes Region's most beloved towns. Showings begin at the first Open House, Friday, March 6th, 4-6 PM or Saturday, March 7th, 12-2 PM. Stop by and see for yourself!
